name: CMP_BUDGET_USAGES
description: Stores the budget used by other components like ICD, Pay etc

columns.Name: BUDGET_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: PERSON_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Person in Event Id

columns.Name: POOL_ID
columns.Comments: Budget Pool Id

columns.Name: PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Plan Id

columns.Name: PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: PERIOD_ID

columns.Name: FOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id for which the amount was used for

columns.Name: FOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment id of the person the amount was used for

columns.Name: USAGE_VAL
columns.Comments: Used Value

columns.Name: USAGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Used Date

columns.Name: USAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of usage, Pay, ICD, CWB

columns.Name: USAGE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: USAGE_TYPE_ID

columns.Name: ENABLED
columns.Comments: ENABLED

columns.Name: CONSUMING_COMPONENT_ID
columns.Comments: Consuming component id in case of ICD and CWB

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.
